allow: PowerShell($base = "D:\\AAApersonal\\文档\\ST\\SillyTavern"; $candidates = @\("data", "public\\worlds", "public\\User Files\\worlds"\); foreach \($c in $candidates\) { $p = Join-Path $base $c; if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p"; Get-ChildItem $p -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5 FullName } })
